About Me

Who I Am

Hi! I'm Akash Soni, a passionate B.Tech Computer Science student with a deep interest in building software that solves real problems. I enjoy working across the full stack — from designing mobile apps to implementing AI models.

I believe in learning by doing. Every project I build teaches me something new, whether it's optimizing a GPS tracking system, implementing data structures in C++, or fine-tuning a machine learning model.

Currently seeking internships and placement opportunities where I can contribute meaningfully, grow rapidly, and work alongside talented engineers.

B.Tech CSE Jaipur, Rajasthan AI & ML C++ Expert Flutter Dev Fast Learner Problem Solver
